Very Stretchy and fits well These high-waisted jeans combine the look of denim with the comfort of stretch jeggings. The material has a soft feel with good elasticity that allows movement without losing shape. Stitching is neat and reinforced at stress points, and the pockets are functional rather than decorative. The dark blue color is even throughout with minimal fading after washing. The waistband provides gentle tummy control and stays in place without rolling. The fit is slimming through the hips and legs, and the lift design enhances the natural shape without being overly tight. Packaging was clean, and the jeans arrived true to size. Overall, a comfortable and stylish option for daily wear.

Great quality, inaccurate sizing. This is a stylish belt that is very well made. The buckle is secure and the material feels lovely. The loop itself makes this an item that is easy to dress up with empire waist dresses and outfits. I love this belt with the exception of the sizing being a little off. I ordered this in a large based on the provided size chart of my waist measuring at 33”. The belt buckles on the first hole provided but I could go in another notch if it was available to me. This leaves almost 10” of extra belt hanging at the end with no additional belt loop to keep it from sagging. The large belt measures 44” overall from buckle to end of belt tail. I am 5’2”, 140lbs with a 33” waist and size 8 pants, size small dresses. I could have easily done the medium and maybe even the small given the extra 10” of belt left. Overall. It is an absolutely lovely belt, high quality, comfortable and very stylish but if you are on the fence about sizing, size down.

Perfect fit and material I was shocked at how well these fit. Other reviews had me worried. Glad I went ahead and bought. Length is great. Material is stretchy. Sizing seems pretty accurate. Wish they had an xs though. Would definitely buy again.

Finally a top that can be purchased separate from bottoms. I am 5’ 3” 115 lbs , 34 DDD. Top isn’t adjustable over the shoulder because it’s one big loop but that doesn’t matter. You can adjust the around the back with the tie. I ordered a large and It’s great if your bigger breast but small around. I mixed it with the Cupshi High Waisted High Cut Cheeky V Cut Bikini Bottom, which wear a small.

Soft, Comfortable and Flattering This pair of pants is made from soft stretchy polyester material. They are very comfortable and flatter your figure. This is a size Medium. Measurements unstretched are: waist 14 inches, inseam 29 inches, hips 17 3/4 inches, flared bottom 10 1/4 inches wide, leg 7 1/2 inches wide, length from top seam 41 inches long. The top of the pants has a fold down waist that can be adjusted for comfort. These pants are super chic looking and move with you when you bend or walk. They do not bind or ride up. I am totally satisfied with this product!

Love these pants I bought these in two colors, black and stormy blue. The wash on the stormy blue was a little different and brighter than I expected but I was okay with it. I'm a size 16/18 and the XL in both are perfect, definitely true to the size chart. They're so comfortable, they don't sag and the waistband doesn't roll down either.

Small cups For reference i am 5 ft 5in FEMALE, 36c cups, 167lbs..45 in hips..L fit the best -see pictures. The M size was too TIGHT, like it snatched me up but my back, arms, and chest was bulging out lol. The L was perfect. If you are 36 or bigger, would not recommend smaller than L because it would be too small on the cups.
It's a very lovely dress. I will definitely purchase other colors. I wore this dress on my 54th birthday shoot.

Great pants true to picture, Black pair came dirty and used I love the pants! They’re a great length for me I’m 5’2 and wanted them relaxed fit and a longer to wear around the beach so I got them in the XL. The fabric is great! Really comfortable and light. Now for the issue... I ordered two a black and white and the white ones are perfect! Great condition, the black ones are in good condition as far as fabric and fit and length very true to the modeled picture however, I clearly received a used and returned pair because there’s a hard powdered substance on the leg of the black pair both front leg and back. The front stains seem to be almost like dried oatmeal while the other stains on the back seem to be like a powder makeup/foundation stain and the fact that someone even returned them like that is just gross to me and completely rude in my opinion, so with that said I highly recommend these pants for a great cover up for summer and I think the seller needs to do a better check of retuned items before selling them out to a new customer. I give this a 3 star despite the conditions of the black pants because the white pants came new and perfect condition, as seen in picture.

LOVE! So flattering! This dress was so flattering. The material is fitted but not clingy. Thick enough that it’s not see through. The wrap and tie make it flattering & slimming in the waist line. Perfect length if you’re short or tall. I am 4’10 and even with flatter shoes it still would have been a nice length. I want This in more colors - I was so comfortable in this all evening!

Definitely not petite! While the material and quality were very nice, the fit was ridiculous. I am just shy of 5' 2", 135lb and ususally wear a 6 in ankle length or an 8 petite due to the smaller cut, but this size 6 petite was more like a size 8 or 10 regular length! I like a high waisted, fitted jean, but these literally came all the way up to my bra band and were still bunching up around my feet. They were very big as well, baggy in the crotch, thighs and seat, not a good look and nothing like what they show on the model. See attached photo.

LOVE these jeans, but... So i have no hips, no butt and skinny legs. i have a hard time with jeans, especially skinny jeans because they will hug my legs from my ankle to my knee, then get baggy and it looks like i'm wearing jodhpurs. so the 711 works very well for me... BUT... check out the photo. i have 2 pairs. they are obviously very different size wise, despite the fact that they're both 26's. the larger pair in the back were freshly washed and dried. the smaller pair in the front, i'd worn all day, so presumably a little stretched out but still significantly smaller than the other pair. fabric content is completely different on these as well. one is 100% cotton, the other has some spandex. the smaller one, thank goodness. i've noticed when trying to find these online, when i change the color choice, the fabric content is often completely different. just be on the lookout.
Love Them!!

Cute khaki pants These pants fit pretty well, and feel nice and comfortable. They are a bit on the tighter side, but I think from the picture I expected to fit a little more baggy than they do. The fabric seems pretty sturdy and is a nice thickness. Not so thin that it's see-through, but not winter-thick either. These pants will be nice for cooler spring/summer days. I like that there are actually pockets in these pants, and they are a decent size for women's pants. I can't fit my entire bulky phone in them, but I can fit my keys and ID. Overall, these are decent pants.

Good just not for me. A very comfortable dress. Was a little matronly for me and 35. I was buying it for a Indian wedding, wanted something more conservative. It was a little low cut. So be conscious. But very comfortable length was good I’m 5’5and would’ve been good with a 3 inch heel.

Even softer after the wash! I can’t believe that after you get a couple of washes in they become smoother and smoother. The material is 95% Polyester & 5% Spandex and made in China. The brand recommends to wash below 40 degrees Celsius and to line dry. I washed them in tap cold water and tumble dried low. I had no issues with shrinkage or fading. They started out silky smooth to sleep in, then I wash it a couple of times and it’s actually even smoother! The pants are wide leg…which makes sleeping in them even more comfortable. There is a pocket on both sides of the pants and in the top left side of the long sleeve top. These pjs were a great find and I’ve worn the as loungewear. Last thing…I ordered my regular size and it fit me exactly how I expected them too.
Really confortable!!! I am a size 18 on regular clothes and I use the same size on this pants. They fit great. I really recommend them for daily use.

Stretchy, comfy, cute!! I love these pants. For 19.99 it's a steal! I almost like them more than my Lululemon. However- I think I like the colors that are more heathered the best. I find them to be more stretchy and comfy rather than the completely solid colors. So I got the heathered black (pictured) the heathered blue & heathered grey/white. All fit amazing. I have the solid red and I haven't tried them on yet but they feel a bit stiffer. (They were also cheaper 9.99) I wear a 4-6 in Lululemon so for these I sized DOWN to a XS and they fit amazing. VERY stretchy. I love them 🙏🏻 So for 19.99 these are a STEAL! Love them!!

Good fit (I’m 5’8”, 215 pounds, and got an XL), cool and light fabric. I wore them on a recent trip to Walt Disney World, and they held up pretty well. They do get wrinkled easily, though, and I was somewhat dismayed to find that the fabric pilled badly in the crotch area (see photo). This was after only one laundering and one vacation where I wore them maybe three days. 😒 I have a feeling that they won’t last for more than one summer season. I expected better for the money, honestly.

These boots are really cute. I got a lot of compliments. The red is beautiful. I bought 4 colors. They're so freaking comfortable and can be worn all day. You can style them with anything. Now as for staying up... do not pull them way up your thigh. They will lose their shape. These are NOT thigh high boots. They are over the knee boots. The boots would have to be around 32 inches to fit well for thigh high boots since they tend to slide down. I had to pin my boots to my jeans to keep them from slipping down. They're definitely over priced. The price should be around $45. They won't stay up is my biggest complaint. Please adjust the length of these boots to 32 inches. 32 inches would fall to 24-26 inches. Since I bought 4 pairs, Im going to buy some wide black elastic and velcro, make them into bands to fit above my knees to keep them in place. These are definitely big calves friendly. I wore the black pair and they stayed up. No issues with the black pair.

I went a si'e larger because I have bigger legs then chest and since they have adjustable straps it was the right move. Im 155lbs 5.2 Flattering Fit I gave a 4 dtar because I haven't washed or swam with it yet.

Poor Quality, but Looks Nice I have this dress in two colors now, navy and ivory. The blue dress seems to be much better made, with more lining in the top. The ivory dress is rather transparent, doesn't have the same lining in the top, and has a bit of a tear in the front. The stitching seems to have torn the fabric where the middle piece meets the chest piece. Overall, I do like these dresses, and they fit my petit torso very well. I have rather large breasts, and even with a push-up the top is still big on me. I am 5'3", and usually wear a 4P or 6P in dresses. It does look nice and I do get a lot of compliments on it! It's a pain to press, and pressing doesn't last very long. I'd pressed it the night before this photo was taken and steamed it morning of, and still it was wrinkled.

Absolutely in love Love Love Love. I bought 2 dresses and really wasnt still sold on them for our wedding i saw this and took a gamble and i was so happy that i did! This dress is super comfortable great for our beach wedding. loved the pink under the dress. pictures do not do it justice. Great price!! love love love. great quality

Great dress! I'm 5'4", 198 lbs and typically wear a size 16 (Old Navy pixie pants) but Amazon recommended I order the 18 based on my order history and other customers. I'm so happy I did! This dress was great to attend a wedding without being too stuffy or restricting. While the midsection and sleeves were great, it was a little big in the chest for me but nothing a safety pin couldn't fix! Overall, I loved this dress and can't wait to wear it again.
It’s a must buy. Very pretty in person and fit true to size. I’m wearing a 2X.

I've purchased three of these pants now, and each color seems to be a different fabric type. The dark brown ones definitely feel like linen, and wrinkle easily. The black ones feel more like polyester, but look enough like linen. The olive ones look and feel like polyester, and have a bit of stretch to them. I bought them in that order, so I don't know if the product has changed that much in six months. In any case, all three pairs are very comfortable. I wore them through a summer pregnancy, and now into postpartum as I'm trying to drop the baby weight. They're flattering and comfortable, which is pretty hard to find right now -- and they'll continue to look good once I've dropped 20lbs.

Fabric disintegrating and tearing at seams The pajama pants were unbelievably comfortable and soft. They fit very well and we’re at the perfect length (for a 5ft 6in tall person). However, after about three washes, I noticed that the seams were ripping, and areas of the pajama pants were becoming threadbare. It will not last a couple more washes.

Can use as maternity scrub pants Was able to use these pants until about 33 weeks pregnant before I took early leave. I ordered these a little bigger due to being pregnant. The waist band is comfortable enough that I’m sure I will use these pants postpartum as well. Very comfy!

I ordered this dress to wear to a country music event. I have some tan boots that I adore, and I think this will pair perfectly with them along with my custom, cowboy hat and wrangler backpack. The ruffles on the sleeves are cute, but still feminine. The length of the dress is excellent, I didn’t want something too short. The denim is durable and does not feel cheaply made at all. It feels like it will last through a few washes as good denim should. I chose the lighter color as I knew I would be outside and didn’t want something too dark. I’m not a fan of the belt, so I’m probably going to change that out. It wraps around my waist and just dangles in the back. I’m 5‘6“ tall and my measurements are 37 inch bust 31 inch waist and 44 inch hip. I’m between a medium and large, but I decided to go with the large due to my hip size. It did fit true to size. Overall and very happy with it and I can’t wait to put my full ensemble together for the event!

Levi's Women's Ribcage Straight Full Length Jeans The fabric is of excellent quality, just right on point with a slight stretch. It's not stiff, nor is it super soft. It allows the garment to maintain its structure while being very comfortable at the same time. I ordered size 28 (inseam is 32). It's a little long for my height, but it will work well with heels or sneakers with a thicker sole too. It also looks great if you roll up the hem. There's no gap at the waist, which is very difficult to find in other models. For reference, my measurements are: Waist 26.5 Hips 37 - 37 1/2 Height 5’3”

great, quality, as all from this brand are So the material, the length, the quality, etc. of these pants are spot on. Great stretch, they look professional but feel like wearing sweatpants. The waistband is comfortable, the pockets fit my phone, the back pockets make these look like real office pants. There are no loose seams, the style is right on. I think all in all, they're perfect, and I'll probably use them for flying when I want to look professional but feel comfortable. There's just something about pants with pockets like these that have NEVER EVER worked for me, and these are no exception. That isnt a fault with the pants, but rather how I feel about them on my body. I do love g4free - they're consistent, and quality. I seek out their products regularly since I have such good experiences with them. The only thing is, I wish they cost about half as much. They're no deal at $40, but would be a great scoop at $20-25.

I wore the original button fly jeans as a GenX in college & these blue jeans do a great job updating that version. They add more spandex to give them stretch which we basically achieved back then by wearing them all day to get them just right. It has some stitching detailing on the front pockets to be fun but is missing any type of stitching on the back pockets which is a missed opportunity. There are gathers/stitching on the front horizontally to give the jeans a retro shape so they hang nicely. My main critique outside of the missing back picket design is that the sizing is too basic- I ordered a L which is my size but maybe due to the spandex could have gone down even to a M? The length of the jeans hits right at my ankles which with wear might even slouch a bit more but sitting down, rises up more than an inch due to my long legs- I definitely cannot be cute & cuff the jeans like the model in the listing picture. These jeans need that length because GenX was not about the 'highwater' look which does trend now. Most jeans have long, short, and medium lengths as needed or sizing based on numerical sizes which helps with narrowing down the fit. Jeans with a lit of spandex stretch easily & can be hard to fit without a try-on. This style is meant to be more baggy but also to be fitted at the waist/crotch. At the end of the day, this is a fun Jean & I plan to wear it out to brunches/lunches with friends, running errands & hanging out with family.
The perfect summer pant! These pants are perfect for summer. They’re lightweight, flowy & keep you cool. I wore them over a swimsuit to the pool today and they looked perfect! True to size.

Comfy and lightweight pants! I got this 3 pack of PJ pants for my pre-teen daugther... they're very comfortable and she really likes them! They're lightweight and thin but not see-through. They fit as expected and have a drawstring waistband for adjusting the fit. The legs are baggy which adds to the comfort plus the fabric is soft and feels nice. These pants are a good value for the money... the quality is excellent. I highly recommend them!
Cute belt. Looks sturdy Looks not high or low end, just like a nice belt. I think it will last with gentle treatment. The leather looks nice and white.

I never write reviews but I thought I would for this one—such a surprise that this fits so well and the quality is great!! I’m normally a 6, ordered a 10 and it’s perfect. Hopefully this helps someone: 34D, 5’5”, 149# (bust 37, waist 32, hips 38) and the 10 is spot on. Woohoo!

J'ai déjà auparavant acheté cette marque de pantalon en magasin que j'ai gardé pendant de longues années. NYDJ sont réputés pour la qualité de leurs linges. Mais voilà, lors de la réception, j'avais bien remarqué que le tissu près de la fourche était "plissé". Je me suis dit que ça allait partir avec quelques lavages... Non seulement ce n'est pas parti, mais ça s'est empiré! Et malheureusement, il est trop tard pour les retourner. Je suis extrêmement décue.

Not a vintage straight leg, although picture shows different I don’t understand how Levi’s can market this as a “straight” leg fit. These a skinny jeans with a loose ankle at best. The picture makes them look like they are a vintage straight leg, loose from thigh to ankle, and they couldn’t be further from it. This is me sizing up as well. I wear a size 31 I am 5’5”—not short so why do they look so long?! Lol. I sized up to 32 after reading reviews. Another weird thing about Levi’s, although well made, they need to do some quality control on sizing. 31 in one fit is loose and 32 in another fit is tight. Makes no sense! This style is also just not in right now, I bought based on the picture not what came

Would purchase again in different colors! Amazing Wow, these palazzo pants over exceeded my expectations! They’re simply amazing. For reference I’m 6’2 (very tall) and 155lbs. These hug the waist and make the booty look big. These also come down to my ankles — so they’re super long!

I have purchased this dress in 3 colors. Blue and Washed Blue and white. The Washed Blue is a good two inches shorter than the blue. I also had purchased this in white but had to return because it is totally see through. All three are totally different materials.

4/5 I really liked the quality of these jeans — the fabric feels durable and comfortable for everyday wear. The color and style are exactly as shown in the photos, and the length fit me perfectly. However, the waistband runs a bit larger than expected, so it fit slightly loose on me. Not a big issue, but I did need to wear a belt for a better fit. Overall, they’re stylish, well-made jeans. Just keep in mind you may want to size down if you prefer a more fitted waist.

Perfect space saver purse organizer This purse organizer was just what I needed. To store my purses that could not get on my shelf. And for the woman who are not handy like me it was so easy to put together and all of the screws and tool is included. Also the instructions are clear and the parts are labeled as well. Good quality,light weight,value for money, it looks great it fits in small places and it gave me what I was looking for with organization.

The jeans are lightweight and comfy, but they are stretchy instead of pure cotton (95% cotton, 4% elastrell). At a first glance they looked not as nice as in the picture, but with a belt and high heels they are beautiful. Only drawback, they are too long for me (1.65 m tall). I usually have an inseam of 32 but this in regular length are so long that even in my highest heels they touch the floor. I'll have to shorten them of at least 5 cm. Note: the pockets on the butt are wide and straight, a detail that tends to widen but optically flatten the butt. This is certainly something to consider before buying them, based on your body shape.

Awkward fit Ultimately it’s just the wrong shape for my body. I bought the small and medium, but size didn’t seem to be the issue - it was the shape. I’m broad in the shoulders and long in the torso, so the top just looked awkward on my shoulders and chest. Sadly, I wouldn’t be able to pair it with heels. I’m 5’4” and the dress was grazing the floor without shoes. It’s also fleece-lined, which would’ve been perfect for a winter party in Minnesota. Cozy and comfy, just not quite right.
Comfortable! I bought the small at first and ended up sending them back for an XS for a tighter fit. I am 5’2 118lbs for reference. Seems like a decent pant for work. They feel great!
Really really cute pants, fabric seems like really good quality, they were thicker than I expected. But I’m 5’8 and they were much too short for me.
Love these pants! Absolutely love these carho pants! The fit and quality are perfect! I bought my true size 4 and they fit great. Love that you can dress these up or down.

Not only are these pants far from camo they're far from sweat pants. I can't even explain how far off from the product photo this item of clothing is.... are they're huge. Cheap material, terrible camo pattern. The best I can describe them is, it looks like someone zoomed in on a camo pattern and screen printed a super blurry pixelated print onto silk pants. 0/10. Save your money.

Comfortable and stretch Love them that I bought 2nd pair. Super strech and soft can't wait to wear. Longer for me given I'm only 5'1". This is sz Med also bought LG and can go either way in size as it fits to body.

Best Jean shorts! No riding up! I don’t do Amazon reviews much, but I HAD to brag on these! I LOVE them! I wore them all day - they didn’t ride up, felt comfy, didn’t dig into my crotch area, and are the perfect fit. I’m 5’8,140 lbs, 34-28-42, & I got these in a size M. It can be so hard to find clothes that fit in the waist but don’t smash my butt, ride up my thighs, or crush my crotch. These jean shorts are better than any I’ve bought anywhere else. I’ll be buying all colors.

El color no es tan intenso como en el anuncio. Pero todo lo demás es exacto como anunciado. No es mezclilla, es algodón y poliéster por lo que es liviano, fresco y flexible. Yo mido 1.60mts, peso 63 kg, y mis medidas son: 100 busto, 80 cintura, 100 cadera, y me quedo perfecto!!! El pantalón llega al piso pero apenas al ras. En la cintura y cadera no aprieta, está justo, es muy cómodo. Me encantó :)
Most Purpose If you are on the fence.....purchase! They are comfortable and stylish and I felt sexy and classy at the same time. Gave my thighs a little attention!!!

Kora runs a size big compared to the midwash jeans I ordered the Kora style in a 3-34 and a 1-34. I already had a pair of the midwash in a 3-34. The Kora size 1 fit the same as the midwash size 3. However, the Kora lengths 34 is longer than the midwash length. 34. The midwash fits more like a 32-in inseam. Both sets of jeans are made very well and I liked the midwash so much. I ordered another pair but I ordered a 3-36 which was perfect to wear with my boots. It avoided the high water look. Both have a little bit of stretch and fit just right. The first three pictures are the Kora size 1-34, the second three pictures are the midwash size 3-36. The last picture is for comparison and is the midwash that I already had in size 3-34?.

I wanted to like this product so bad. But I had to return it since it didn’t fit as I had hoped. I am a 26” waist and 36.5” hips with a 26.5” inseam (I’m 5’2”). The waist was too large, and the length was too long. I was hoping the pants would hit somewhere below my ankle, but they bunched at the bottom. It fit my hips just fine and the material feels good for the price, unfortunately it just didn’t fit in the other areas.

This bathing suit fits well. I'm usually sz 10/12 pants, small chest, and I ordered large sz bathing suit. The back clip occasionally gets loose, but the top still says in place because of the halter shape.

I love this swimsuit. It is very flattering and comfortable. I love the print. Good coverage on the rear and great for a longer torso. The only thing I would change is to have a removable strap to make it more modest for playing/swimming with my kids. I am 5’7” and 160ish lbs. curvy/athletic mom. I ordered an XL.

These pants are very soft and comfortable but, as others have said, just a bit thinner than expected. However, for the price, I have no complaints. They come just to the bottom of my feet and I’m 5’4”, so if you’re tall they might be a bit too short for you, and if you’re short you may need to hem or fold them. They wash well and have nice pockets and a nice, comfortable drawstring waist that is wide enough not to dig into you. There is a logo by the one pocket and it’s situated nicely.

Loved then so much I bought a second pair. Both ripped I bought the first pair and fell in love they were comfortable and lightweight. After one wash (Air dry as advised), I wore them again and decided I needed a second pair. On the third wearing the pair started to rip. Not in the seam but in the middle of the fabric by the time I got home, there were three holes. I wore the other one and within an hour, there was a huge rip again not in the seam. I am a big girl but these weren't tight and very roomy. I also am a costumer so if these riped at the seam that would make sense the literally randomness is what makes this awful. I am so disappointed.

Very simple thin shirt yet the look and deisgn is perfect This looks thin and simple but the floral design really sparks up the shirt. It's great even in the summer as the sleeves are see-through and the inside has a thin undershirt attached. Very classy and cute.

AMAZING jeans but size down if you like a tighter fit Despite the look on my face I do love these jeans! They're stretchier than I had thought which isn't a bad thing. I'm 5'6" and 175lbs so I ordered an XL based on my measurements. They fit fine, they don't fall down, but if I wanted a tighter fit I would definitely go with my true Large size. (which I'll probably do. These are however great family meal jeans lol) I'll definitely be ordering again!

I comfortably wear a size 12 with a curvy body type. This swimsuit has a large bottom than I normally get for an XL. The fabric is thick! It’s awesome. The stitching is good and I feel the coverage is perfect, especially for this mom-bod. At the current price of $27.88 this is exactly as described and I would buy again.
Good fit I am a very petite woman. They fit as expected and I felt great in them. (This was my daughter's nursing pinning ceremony)
Love it! Muy bonita!

Definitely recommend!! Im 5’6 and weight 165 and bought a medium. It fit perfectly. The material is really soft, it’s not see through either. I love how the dress rises on the sides to add a little sexy flair but lowers in the front in back to make sure your covered and your butt isn’t hanging out. I wore this to a salsa dancing class and had so much fun spinning it around but it’s honestly so cute I would wear this anywhere. The sleeves are amazing as well especially if you don’t want to have to wear a jacket. The only thing I had an issue with is the zipper wasn’t super smooth.
Super stretchy Very comfortable and stretchy. I am 5'8 and they are a little short hence the 4 stars. Overall love the pants can dress up or down.
Fits just right! It is really hard for me to find pants that fit right they are either too long or too short but this ones are perfect will definitely buy again!

I love these Raypose High Waist Tummy Control Capri Yoga Pants. They are so soft and the material is luxurious and soft and stretchy. I got a size large and am happy with the fit. I am 5'9", 210lbs with a 32" waist and 42" hips. I highly recommend these awesome pants.

I was not happy with these jeans I bought a medium. I’m normally a large weighing in at 170 5’4 . The bottom of the legs are not skinny jeans at all like in the picture. I had to roll them up at the bottom to give a more appealing look. I also had to pull them up as if they were hiwaist pants and put a belt on for them to even fit halfway decent. I tried to send them back for a small and the only option they gave was to get my money back.

If you looking for classic blue jeans skip this My fault for not checking them—I ordered a Short which states 28”…these are not. The amount of stretch in these jeans is unbelievable. I pulled some material on my upper thigh and in picture you can see just how much stretch. I just wanted a pair of regular blue jeans not some faux jeans that are more like exercise pants. Extremely disappointed

Hi! I got a medium and they fit exactly as the size chart indicated. Unfortunately, I didn’t trust the size chart and ordered a size bigger than I needed. I thought “There’s no way I’m a small - I’m hardly ever a small in bottoms” but My waist is 29 inches and I should have gotten the small. As you can see, the medium is too big on me. The denim is a little bit thinner than other jeans I own, but not in a bad way. There’s a little stretch to it, but probably not enough that you could size down. I do think the pockets on the back are a little smaller than I’d like, which makes my butt look kind of huge. Not the end of the world! Ok I love you bye!
My wife loves this bathing suit. She is so happy it fits her because it's very tough to find a sexy suit to fit her 4 11" 88lbs body. She looks so sexy in it. Thank you.

Good design and fits well but zipper is not smooth at all This review is for: Womens Wide Leg Jeans High Waisted Stretchy Baggy Jeans for Woman Trouser Jeans for Women Trendy Loose Jeans Listed at $41 these wide leg jeans are actually not that wide leg and are very comfortable. They go above my bellybutton and are High waisted style. I like that the material is fairly thick and the color is not washed off easily. I ordered size 4 for a 5 foot for 122 pounds person and these fit perfectly. I did use their size chart. My only issue with these is that the zipper gets caught and it’s not smooth at all like normal zippers. This feels like a very cheap zipper material/ quality for $40 jeans.

Every Tall Snow Boots I usually wear an 8.5-9 and I sized up to a 10. I really like the fit. The insulation is thick and they truly are a quality pair of snow boots. The insoles that come in the shoe are fuzzy, warm, and a little thick. They also include an extra pair of thinner insoles, so if you switch them out, they may give you a little more room. They really fit me great as-is, so if the padding compresses with use, I may add them in addition to the other insoles, for a snugger fit. They’re comfortable and flexible. They are a little heavy but everything is as expected for this type of boot. The stitching and seams all look good and it seems like great attention was paid to quality control. I wouldn’t hesitate to buy from this brand again.

Amazing dress for the price and closely identical to the photo My daughter is 5ft 10in and around 230lbs. We had the dress tailored to her measurements and chose the Dusty Rose color. It's hard to see the exact color in photos, but you can see what I think is as close to the exact color in the photo attached that's brighter and more of a pink color than the other 3 photos.I am pleasantly happy with the dress. I gave a need-by date 1 week sooner than we actually needed it by just to be on the safe side and it came 4 days before that.The material wrinkles easily, but I used a very low setting on my iron and was able to get the wrinkles out before she put the dress on. Lacing up the back was a CHORE but it turned out beautifully!One thing I didn't like about it was the flap of fabric that covers the skin where the lacing is in the back. I didn't like how grandma measured her, so I tried to offer a couple extra inches in the waist when sending measurements to the seller but it still wasn't quite wasn't enough and that fabric flap is awfully small. With the help of some shaper wear, I was only just able to get the fabric to go from one side of the lacing to the other but I'm not sure how it held up for prom/moving/dancing. She had the dress off before I got home that night. I would recommend adding more fabric there for extra security because one slight slip and her underwear would have shown in the back.Let me tell you though, this kid does NOT like dressing up. Doesn't like makeup. Doesn't like jewelry. Doesn't like dresses. But she told me at one point that she felt pretty. That's all that matters to me. I was absolutely beaming and she definitely looked gorgeous in this dress. Especially with the cascading fabric over the stomach to allow her shape appear more flattering.I definitely recommend buying this dress, and highly recommend the seller.The reason why I'm giving it 4 stars out of 5 is because of the trouble with the flap in the back being so small and unforgiving, the ease of getting wrinkles, how painstaking it is to lace the back (though that's also a bonus for a good fit so it really is hard to hate it), and the bust of the dress folding down in front. None of these things are enough to make me dislike the dress or want to send it back. We were very happy with the purchase.

Because of the sizing issue and pants coming out wrinkled I give this 3 stars. The material is good and the pants felt comfortable when worn.

Wonky sizing. very unimpressed I carefully used the size chart before ordering, which said that for a 29.9" waist to get a size 12. 3.5 stars is what I would actually give if we could do half stars. Overall love the fit and the comfort, and I love that it is a nice deep, dark black. I washed before wearing and taking pics, and it didn't fade at all. The aspect I am not at all happy with is the bunching and puckering in the front where the body of the pants meets the waistband. At first I thought maybe it's because they are elastic / pull on, but that can't be it because I have other pull-on jeans from other brands and they don't do that. It's the way the pockets are sewn, I think, which is not very well. They bunch and stick up. Usually when I get a pair of jeans that does this, I sew the pockets shut and trim off the extra pocket fabric, but I don't feel like taking on one of those projects right now, and if I did, it would only solve half the problem because the waist has already been sewn puckered. Shirts that cover the waistband should mostly help out with this, but I will still be irritated having to shove the pockets down all the time. Why even bother having pockets? Do most gals put stuff in their front pockets? I don't, and if I did, it would slide out of these too easily. This would be a much better garment without the front pockets, for sure, unless they can be made better.

I ordered the light blue jeans in a size L, (I normally wear a size 29 but since these are supposed to be baggy I figured the L would work best). I tried them on and they actually fit great. If they stay the same or even shrink a tiny bit they’ll be excellent. If they stretch out over time like some jeans do, then they’ll probably be a little too big I think and not in a baggy good type of way. I’m 5’5” and they’re a good length; a little bit shorter than most of my jeans but perfect for sneakers without dragging. You could even wear these with high sandals or heels if you wanted to show-off some fabulous shoes. These jeans would really showcase them. I really liked the fabric and the slight stretch. They are SO comfortable and soft. I also like the two buttons above the zipper instead of the typical one button. The color was great too. Now, it says they are mid-rise, and perhaps it’s a size thing or just a preference of mine, but when I wore these mid-rise, there was too much fabric down there. If I wore them high-waisted the rise fit my body well and comfortably. I just don’t like the look of jeans that have that excess fabric in between the legs because I think it just looks strange (same with if the fabric is too tight- not a good look). So, I’ll probably wear these high-rise (or semi-high-rise). Maybe I should have ordered the Medium I really prefer jeans that are loose around the waist so maybe the true test is to see if they shrink or not after washing them. After looking at the photos that I’m adding to the review, I think it would look better with the back-pockets a bit closer together (more like the model’s picture). They’re still keepers due to the comfort, the unique style and unique length. I like jeans that are a bit unique or different than all the other pairs and these fit that bill too. Style Tips from Y2K: I was a teen in the 90’s and sometimes I would wear sweatpants or boxer shorts under my baggy jeans (lots of girls did this). We made sure the waistband underneath stuck out a bit so you could see it. We would pair that with a tight crop top or tube top. I would also be using a shoelace as a belt or some type of chain belt. Finally my pager would be clipped onto my front pocket and an attached chain would then be clipped onto my front belt hook. I’d have sneakers on. I’d also be wearing a dark burgundy lipstick with the outer lip liner visible since it was slightly darker. How fun it is to reminisce and also see a style go round the second time!

The first thing I noticed about these yoga pants was the stitching down the front of the legs to create a crisp line. There are also pockets on the front to be below the baby. All of the stitching is straight & even around the pockets and where the belly band attaches to the pants. The pants look professionally assembled, and they look professional on. The fabric is somewhat thin, and the legs are wide. Since these are intended to be warn during exercise, the lightweight fabric and flowy legs make sense. They’re what I’d expect in yoga pants, and they should keep me comfortable in the summer heat. The size charts are a bit unusual. I normally wear an 8 or 10, and would order a Medium. But my measurements on their chart put me at a 4-6. I believed it and got a Small. They’re a little more snug in the seat and thighs than I like, but they have plenty of stretch, so I believe they’ll continue to fit as I grow. I would suggest people order their usual size, and don’t go by the measurements shown in the size chart in the listing. Overall, really nice pants with slimming lines and lots of stretch.

I’ll probably wear them cinched most often just because I think it looks cuter but it’s nice to have both options. Underwear lines my be an issue for those that are wondering since the fabric is so thin. The pockets are a good size (can definitely fit a phone/keys/lip balm) & the waist band is nice & wide (about an inch, maybe a bit more). Overall great design marrying functional with cute.

I’m still trying to decide how I feel about these pants. The 12s were too big, so I purchased the 10s this time. For the most part, they fit well, though a bit snug in the waist (I do carry most weight in my stomach). They have enough stretch to be comfortable though. The back pockets are big, which would be fine (since I keep my phone in my butt pocket), except they’re big enough that it goes below the bottom of my butt and creates an odd look. I’m certainly not bootylicious, but these pants definitely make my booty look flatter than it is. If you have any chub in your stomach, these pants don’t look great with a tight/fitted shirt - you’ll want to pair with something looser. I have examples of two different shirts of reference. I love doing a French tuck with my tops (tucking the front into my pants) - it looks fine from the front, but from the side, the pants definitely accentuate my stomach pooch. Since measurements are when deciding to buy clothes online, mine are 40-33.5-39, 168 lbs. As you can see from the pictures, they’re definitely a longer pant - I’m just shy of 5’6” and they go just below my ankle bone. Super comfy, but I’m not sure yet if I’ll keep them, since I want to feel confident in whatever I’m wearing for work and these definitely accentuate some flaws and are a bit hard to match tops with.
Absolutely amazing! If I could give this dress 10 stars I would!. Nice sturdy material nice fit!

I love the pant, but there is no consistency with size between the color choices. I love the style and quality of material in these pants. I was disappointed that the same size is not consistent within the color choices. in the photos you will notice that they are the same size and style on the tag, but the other photo shows that navy is almost two inches longer. I would order more if there was consistency.

Seriously the best freakin belt ever. Better than Hermes or any other branded belt. And so flattering! Obsessed. Buying more. I leave it on my pants and have washed and put it through the dryer 20+ times - and it’s still perfect. Comfortable and so clever. Love love love.

Buy it!! Absolutely loved trying on this dress! Bought this dress for my childhood best friend’s wedding! I’m 5’8 120Ilbs and bought an Xs. The only really I returned it is because the Xs hugged my body too tight around the stomach area. A size Small would’ve been perfect. This dress is also tall girl friendly!! Buy it! Def worth the price!

No stretch, get "Tall" if you want high waist I'm 5'6" and 210lbs. Fairly proportional. I got a Medium Tall. I have to maneuver the waist band over my bum, but once they're on they are fine. There is zero stretch in the legs tho. Also, the draw string isn't 360°. It only goes to the side seems, from there it becomes an elastic band. I'm not a fan of these type of drawstrings, but the cost is cheap. Pockets are deep. They are transparent (see photo). I'm a home health RN and lighting is not even close to hospital lighting, and im alone so im fine. May need shorts underneath if in a hospital. I definitely prefer the Dickies cotton stretch ones tho.

These jeans were a pleasant surprise. The denim is stretchy but holds its shape well, and the bootcut style gives them a nice, flattering look. They fit me great at the waist and are comfortable enough to wear all day. I would definitely buy another pair

Pretty good quality for the price. I’m 5’11 and 160-170lbs. These are a small and they fit great. I wanted a fitted look and this exactly what they gave. Plenty of stretch room and they go all the way down right above my ankles which I prefer because my bottoms tend to get loose on the ankles if they go any further. If you want a loose fit then medium or large would probably be best. Cheers!

I wanted these to lounge at home so I ordered an XL but a L would have been the proper size (5'2" and 180lbs). Very comfortable pants with elastic waist, forgiving and light fabric perfect for summer. Also has real and deep pockets. The legs are wide with slits on one side. It's the perfect pants to lounge at home or walk down to the corner store.

This is my second jeans from this brand (different design) and i LOVE it. I loved the first pair so i wanted to get a second one and honestly so glad i did. It definitely mid rise i wouldn’t really consider this low rise jeans but its fine. It’s honestly great jeans for what it cost. The color is exactly how the picture shows it is. The size is perfect for me and fits be amazing. I didn’t know these jeans didn’t have back pockets so that came as a surprise guess i didn’t look at the pictures enough and the front pockets are buttons so more secure to put money and it won’t fall out. DEF RECOMMEND!!

Very nice pair of jeans I'm 165 lbs and 5'7, and I carry my weight in my mid-section. I bought these just to see; had zero expectations because the reviews were mixed. So here are some photos and some of my info. I'm 5'7 so these are just the right ankle length for me. Very, very stretchy overall, the waistband is comfortable and not snug on me, it just lies perfectly flat and doesn't create a muffin top. It is true jean material with a lot of stretch. They might loosen up as the day progresses but haven't noticed it yet. The color I purchased was OffShore Blue and it is perfectly mid-light wash.

I have been searching for a simple one piece to avoid sunburn without having tons of extra fabric to hold water like most larger suits have. I'm 5'4" and about 360lbs and the 6X is clearly made for someone taller, but it fits fine. (I think it might even work for someone a bit heavier than me) I like that it comes up very high in the armpit so I'm less likely to get a sunburn on that area. It's just a plain, cheaply made bathing suit, but it's comfortable and functional. I do wish the gusset were wider, and I would prefer the leg holes be cut a bit lower, and the back higher, but it's not a deal breaker. I will say that the cups had just been folded in half and shoved in, so they're winked and they're difficult to get placed correctly. They're also thin, so you may want a dark color if you're worried about people noticing your nipples. There's also some uneven sewing and a bit of a weird spot where the bra shelf connects to the side. Overall, I'm just thrilled this suit exists in this size and I'm quite happy with it after one day in the pool.
Love!!! I ordered a size medium. I’m 5’3” 145 lbs. I love these jeggings! Supe flattering, comfortable and I love the color!! Will buy the black ones next!
size_display: mediumstyle: ultra soft high waist denim leggings

user_comment: I’m 5’3 and 130 lb. I ordered small petite. They fit great. Still have room around the waist and super stretchy. They are more formed around the butt and legs that the pics show but plenty of room to move! Great fit and price

JUST LIKE GYMSHARK! Absolutely love it! I have some gym shark and it feels exactly the same and looks the same. I absolutely love this uniform. It fits good and does well when you launder it. The stretch on the side gives me extra room. I am 5 feet 1 and weigh 180 pounds and I wear a size large so I have bought a large petite eggplant is the color..!

Super comfortable Exactly what I was looking for in a lounger/jogger style pants. Perfect for working out, laying around the house, or running errands. They have a fitted yet loose fit in all the right places. The material is stretchy yet almost silky feeling. I would buy several of these again. I got a large and am 5' 6" and 155lbs and they fit perfectly at my waste. If you’re in between sizes go down one! I’m an 18/20 and I got the 18 and it fits perfect. I’m 5’3 and the length was really great it just hit the floor Only complaint is the sequins rubbing on my arm were a little uncomfortable but I can deal Beautiful dress overall!
Go up a size ! These pants were cute! They were a little snug I got my regular size a XL. It was snug on my waist. For a better fit I recommend going up a size.

Lightweight and breathable I like that these pants are very lightweight. They are also breathable. The fabric feels comfortable as well. The quality is good and satisfactory. The only thing that I don’t like is that the fabric is see through. Any lightly colored underwear can be seen underneath, so darkly colored underwear should be worn to prevent this from happening.

A little too big I like these legging capris because of the pockets. The pockets are placed and sized as typical pant pockets. The leggings are made of a very soft material. I wouldn't say they are tummy control, but just the typical legging tummy control (there's no extra fabric, nor is the material in general super dense to hold in the tummy). I'm between sizes XL and XXL - I got these in XXL because I don't like my leggings super tight. I'd say these run a bit big and I should have gotten the XL. I do really like them a lot as they are great for casual around the house and running errands. I also really love the two pockets. The color is a true, deep black. The workmanship on them is good - consistent stitching and no stray threads.
Good if you want to wear it once After the second time you wear it it starts to develop hard fuzz. And it doesn't stop. The material is really bad, it's only good for creating microplastics.

Decent, cozy leggings This gray with white strip fuzzy inner lining leggings are soft, comfy and warm. Material thickness is just right and has quality stitching. It has two side deep pockets where I can store my phone without it falling out. The fitting is slightly loose on me because the waist is higher than I expected it. Good for jogging on a crisp cooler weather or simply running errands. I thought the fleece part would be a bit thicker, but it's fine. Overall pretty decent leggings for everyday wear

These are very comfortable and stretchy. The waist is high and fits great. Unfortunately, I am 5'9" and these just brush the top of my feet. The bottom isn't even hemmed so I can't take it out for more length. It would be great if they were either longer, or had a hem I could take out.

HAPPIERE Plus Size Jeans for Curvy Women High Waist Stretchy Cropped Pants Denim Jeggings with Pockets I feel like I can never have too many pairs of jeggings. They are usually my go-to relaxing clothes. One thing I love about these is that the waist comes up a bit higher in the back. When you lean over or bend, you don’t have to worry about showing anything—it keeps you nicely covered. The coloring is really nice, and the material is stretchy and comfortable. They do run a little bit large, however, and I would suggest going down a size if you like them more like leggings rather than a little baggy. Other than the size, the fit is relatively flattering overall.

Groovy bell bottom pants - super stretchy Super comfy and stretchy. The jeans are stylish with a raised pleat on the front of the legs and a stonewashed, weathered look denim. The jeans are seriously wide legged. The leg portion is loose and wide throughout, from the thigh down to the hem. The pant legs are as wide as bell bottom pants from the 70's. I'm 5'5" tall and the hem fell on the ground when wearing trainers. The jeans are a 'one size fits all' pull on fit, so I expected they would be a little long on me. The front pockets are plenty deep to securely carry my smart phone. There are also 2 standard pockets on the back. Vintage looking, soft, and roomy.

For your information, - the Levi's tab on the back pocket is black - not red. - the patch on the back (with the Levi's symbol, size etc) is black - not brown/beige. See photos attached. Accurate size (exactly as in the "Levi's size chart") and nice material. The package arrived quickly. Will buy again.

The Quorvash knee high boots are the perfect addition to my fall/winter wardrobe. The faux leather is soft and looks more expensive than it is. The small kitten heel is is the perfect height to dress an outfit up and still keep them comfortable to wear all day long. I selected the red color and I am so glad I did. The zipper runs smoothly and is overall, this is a good quality boot for the price.

i buy clothes / bathing suits on amazon all the time and most of them get returned. i am pleasantly surprised at the fit and support of this bathing suit!! i’m going to buy another one too! i’m 5’4 150 lbs and i got a large.

Nice pants!!! The pants are great. I’m 5’3 so they aren’t super long like some of the reviews said. The just hit the back of my heel so if your taller don’t count on them being super long. I am also wearing a large.

So comfy and amazing quality These are much better and half the price of the Kookaburra line by Ugg. Lining is soft and plush and doesn’t flatten down. I LOVE the brushes gold metal tag on the back. I’m a 10 and ordered a 9.5 fits perfect. I like these even better than Uggs

Came with a hole.. I feel like there's so much potential for these pants, and I'll probably still wear them however my excitement was quickly discouraged once I tried them on for the first time. Comfortable, Snug, Hugs my curves I love these pants! The fit is awesome, and I feel both confident and comfortable in them. I do wish they had pockets, but I think the snug fit might suffer a bit with pockets, especially front pockets. I am also very happy with the quality of the jean.

I normally Wear a med but bc it is Amazon, I sized Up and got a large. I’m 5’1” and about 152. The large covered wat it needed to. Not sure if I have Gotten a small if it would have been too tight but i was happy with the large.

I didn’t give this 5 stars because I feel like it’s too good to be true. I ordered these because I’m short but slightly curvy at the bottom and I’m tired of buying expensive work pants for them to look like crap a few days after purchase. I was searching for a ‘jegging’ type of pant and wit the price of these you can’t beat it. I ordered small and they are JUST right to the point where I’m pulling them on and they almost feel like they’re going to rip sliding over my hips but then they go into place and BAM they’re perfect. The material is like a jean/legging material. Stretchy but not too stretchy and they LOOK like jeans. I am wearing them for the first time today and I’m hoping I don’t jinx myself and bust a hole or something. I’ll update if I do.

I will start by saying that I do not normally have great luck ordering swimsuits online, especially top and bottom together as a set. I was pleasantly surprised by this, and will actually totally wear this bikini! The quality is much nicer than other suits I've order from Amazon too. I think this is very flattering and it offers a good amount of coverage, while also still feeling sexy. I am 5'9, 155 lbs and typically wear a size 6 or 8 in pants. I ordered a size large, and the bottoms fit great! I'm a big fan of high waist styles, and these come all the way up to my belly button. I am small chested (B cup), and the top is definitely a little big for me, but I can make it work if I tie it tight. This would probably be a good top for women who are more endowed up top than myself lol. I am usually a medium top size, but I knew the bottoms would never fit me if I ordered a medium because I have wide hips and bigger thighs. I'm really happy with this, and you can never go wrong with black bottoms because you can mix with any bikini top!

Buyer beware - leaves unflattering sweat marks Bought these for some comfortable jean alternatives, about an hour after I started working I looked down and saw KNEE SWEAT! (Didn’t realize that was a thing). I had my phone in my pocket and sure enough my whole pocket outline and booty showed a sweat ring looking like I pee’d myself. Very comfortable - the fabric just tells an unflattering story.

PERFECT FIT! Most reviews said to buy this dress and I couldn't agree more! I'm 5'3", 140 lbs, 34A-B bust, and pear shaped. I bought the size Small. This dress was packaged nicely and came as shown in the listing through Amazon fulfillment. The fabric is very nice, soft, and well lined. Very flattering fit. The "train" sits at the top of the back of my heel (around ankle length) when standing barefooted. It is a white polyester blend material, so you want to make sure you wear NUDE COLOR undergarments so not to have obvious color changes, especially in photos. A strapless bra is perfect for this dress as well. The back is a delicate zipper, not uncommon for nicer semi-formal dresses, so be careful when using it. I haven't washed it yet. Dry clean or follow the instructions on the tag carefully. When in doubt, hand wash and hang to dry. TIP: Be sure to check the sizing chart in the photos! I was at the top range of the Small and bottom range of the medium. I chose Small, especially since I know I'm losing weight. Fit is very good and will be when a few pounds are lost as well. I want to say this dress is pretty close to "true" sizing, at least for me. I'm beyond pleased with this dress! I've never ordered clothing online and really appreciate the other reviews and questions for helping me make a great decision!

Stylish, fit well, look great on. I really like the style of the boots and they are well made. The zipper makes them easy to put on and take off and the fit is exact. The heels just the right height and are easy to walk in, the soles are rubber to help prevent slipping. The only issue I have is that there is a very thin layer of foam inside the boot so walking on them for extended periods may become uncomfortable. Overall, they are a good set of boots, the color is very fall, they fit well and are easy to get in to.

Amazing leggings I was very consumed with all of the different reviews saying that this is see through or just seeing pictures of ripped leggings and other things. Here’s a honest review and I am not getting paid or anything to post something “positive”. First of all, I don’t consider this to be see through. I don’t know what’s the deal with that and I don’t wear a thong all the time either. I feel that almost all leggings are a little see through specially if you are squatting(most of my leggings are a little see through). Ironically, I feel like this one is less see through as other leggings I have. Maybe if someone come very close to you and stares at tour butt they’ll be see through but no one at the gym will do that or they should not. My rating goes more directed to how it looks in the front. It does look awesome in the back, your flutes look on fire. If you don’t have a big but it won’t make miracle but it does look good. But in the front it looks kind of weird. It doesn’t make your hips look nice and you kind look like an ice cream if you have a belly fat (I have one). But at the same time, it does Tuck your belly in so that’s good and you kind of look like you had a flat belly(but the fat goes out on the sides and that’s not flattering). I think that’s the only thing I don’t like. Besides that, the flexibility. Fortunately my leggings are not ripped and they came all good. But I’ve noticed that when I do squats I don’t feel like they are very strong and I don’t feel like they are that good for stretching. For the price, I would have expected something. A little stronger and better when using for squats and things like that. So maybe keep looking at yourself after finishing a routine to make sure it’s not ripped or something like that. Overall, I’ve been working out with these leggings and nothing like that has happened. But as I don’t have a flat belly and these are kind of thigh, my belly fat looks super ugly when I squat down. I am a small size and I ordered a small one and they fit me as they should. Also, if you use them for a prolonged time, they leave you small marks from the texture but it’s not too bad. They always go always and it is just on the belly area. I left a picture so you can see it! I matched these leggings with a textured long sleeve crop top that I also got from Amazon and I am obsessed of how the outfit ended up looking. Anyways, I am happy with the leggings. I got them after seeing them on TikTok all the time.
These are so comfortable! I'm glad that I got the 3 pack!

Quality not that good Although these pants are thin and fit well, the quality of the fabric is not so great . The hair in the picture literally stuck to the pants within 2 minutes that I was trying them on. Not the best option if you have pets

5'9" 200lb 36D "hourglass" hahaha, long torso Of course I will always be self conscious ab my arms and legs, never have worn a two piece and after having a baby three mo ago I'm still at the heaviest I've been since high school but I was not missing out on pool season.. In genere vesto una 44 italiana, di questo ho preso una 44/46 mi stringe un po’ sui fianchi. Però non tanto da doverlo rendere. Bello il colore, bello il modello. Se siete indecisi sulla taglia prendete quella più grande.

Body Art I have to admit, I was slightly skeptical when I placed the order. The price was way too good and I just wasn’t certain the quality would be up to par. I was wrong on all fronts. I am so glad I took the leap. The colors are vibrant, the material is light (but not flimsy) and the fit couldn’t be better. I needed this for an art exhibit I was attending and the compliments didn’t stop. I felt amazing and quite “artsy”. If you’re on the fence, hop off and click “buy now”! You won’t be disappointed!

I appreciate that the suit came with a protective strip of paper on the inside of the suit at the crotch. Unfortunately, it came in such a vacuum-sealed package, it looked like a flat piece of cardboard. It also arrived on a hot day, and between having all the air sucked out of the package and the heat, I could not remove tbr paper at all, at first, then later, the glue. I soaked it and tried using dish soap to remove the adhesive, it was not going anywhere. See how the fabric even stuck to itself in this photo. Seriously — I am glad for the sanitary element of not sharing a potential disease with any previous buyers of this item, but lighten up on the darn glue! It’s the only suit I’ve heard of that you can wear and get a bikini wax at the same time! I’m returning this one and am ordering a replacement. Fingers crossed there’s nothing in the next crotch that can’t be removed. Aside from that, I liked the suit and it fit me well. It would have been nice to be able to wear it. Update: I ordered a second suit and was handed the package directly from the delivery person. This time it was in the morning and had spent minimal time being transported in extreme heat. The impact? This time I was able to remove that protective strip, despite excessive amounts of super sticky glue. So I like the suit, the manufacturers just need to lighten up on the glue! By about 95%!
I LOVE THEM Ummmm hell yes I LOVE these! I bought 4 pairs and so happy I did. I want more!!!

Love the pants I ordered a small but they were not as fitted as I would have liked I’m 130 lbs

I'm 5'4" and about 174 lbs, 32G/32H or 34G, 41 bust, 31.5 under bust, 33/34 natural waist , 44/45 butt. I bought the XXL to avoid any digging in at the hips and accommodate my booty but it left the waist gaping. Under my breasts it doesn't rest against the skin making the nylon threads visible. At the bottom of the line section it fit perfectly at my natural waist so I think that the suit must be around 34 inches an inch or two above the belly button. It does have some stretch and I think the XXL would accommodate up to a 38 inch natural waist but tightly. I would order based on the average of your under bust and waist measurement since that is the only part that doesn't stretch and then round down. So if your under bust is 34-38 XXL it's fine otherwise go smaller. Aside from the waist it fits like dream on my hips and has decent lift on the breasts even without the band support. I recommend going for an XL or smaller if your hips are 43 inches or less. Next time I’ll order a XL but I’m going to just take the waist in. I think a L would have fit but would have dug into my hips too much. Below are the measurements they have for the suit in the product description for comparison. Size Bust Hip Waist L 12 37.0 39.5 28.5 L 12 38.0 40.5 29.5 XL 14 40.0 42.5 31.5 XXL 16 41.5 43.5 33.0

Good Fit! I was skeptical about these because of reviews but honestly not a bad fit! For reference I’m 5’1, 130 pounds. Bought a Medium. Plenty of room in the butt and crotch. These jeans were ordered for my daughter who had the following feedback... I am frequently looking for cute, new, stylish jeans to wear. I was attracted to this pair, because of the flare fit. I was disappointed that the jeans were not true to the picture in the fit - the jeans are more of a bootcut fit than flare (as shown in the pictures). The color of the jeans is also different from the pictures online. The jeans have a yellowish-green hue which is not shown in the pictures online. I was a bit nervous about ordering a size "M" in jeans, because I typically wear a size 30". The waist of the pants fit nicely, but they were a bit short (I am 5'6" and have average length legs for reference). The fabric does have a nice stretch to it, because of the 1.5% spandex. The fiber content is fine, 51.% spandex, 68% cotton, and 30.5% polyester. These will not breathe like regular jeans and I could see them getting hot as they are worn. These jeans are easy to care for, because they can be washed on a cool cycle, but should be line dried. There are some positives for these jeans too. The front pockets are deep and the button and zipper closure work well. I appreciate that the button loops are reinforced with felt circles on the inside to prevent them from tearing over time. I also like the fringed hem on the jeans. Overall, these will be okay jeans to wear outside for yard work, but I am not overly impressed. The color and fit are not true to the pictures, so this is why they received three stars.

I don’t mind my shorts being loose, so large it is. The only issue is the butt…. It looks so saggy and frumpy. The fabric is soft and stretches a lot, so by the end of the day they look baggy, but the waist still fits fine. The graining is beautiful and it’s a nice shade of gray. I don’t normally like fringed but it looks pretty cool. Highly recommend these if you have bigger thighs, hips, or curves in general! Try a size up if you like them loose.

The second time I washed them I forgot about them, and they went through a full dry cycle on low temp. They came out wrinkle free but shrunk 2-3” in length. They also shrank in width but still fit. I am glad I chose to size up, as the pants run a little small. The pants were stretchy and easy to put on. I didn't have to suck in my stomach or anything in order to pull them up. I could also button them with no need to hold my breath. So I was shocked when I went to put my hand in the pockets and broke two of the belt loops. I wasn't even pulling on them or applying any tension to them. However, in my investigation of the issue, I also found that the button loops are not parallel to each other; they seem off-center a bit. While the overall look is cute, I don't think these are well-made or high-quality. I also have a bit of a gut, and I was hoping that the high-waist would help to diminish that, but I feel that this style accentuates my stomach. I think these might be better suited for those who wear a smaller size and have a flatter stomach.

Cute, comfortable slip ons While I wouldn't recommend anyone wear these for activities that require good support or times you will be up on your feet all day, they are really comfortable for everyday, light wear use. Not made to last I bought these(7 pair total) as uniform pants for my daughter. They were the only ones I could find in tall. She loved the fit-at first. If you have a few curves, the zipper and front pockets do not lay flat. The next size was too big, so this size seemed perfect. The color was great. They were the perfect thickness. Not the flimsy fabric that sits in every dip and imperfection. The absolute worse, however, is that a month in, after 4/5 washes in cool water and drying on low, a million elastic strands started popping out all over. It seems to be where the fabric is stretched most, hips and buttocks. So, just a few months into the school year, I have to hunt for tall pants from a durable brand. The school requires expensive shirts and blazers. I saved a few dollars here, but they were not cheap. Either way, money out the window and I’m not happy. See the photos

SHORT, BIGGER GIRLS—buy these jeans! My body type: 5’ 5” and 242# with short, thick legs and a belly. My search for the perfect cargo jeans is over! I have been struggling to find the perfect pair of cargo jeans until now...these ETELLO jeans are everything! The quality of the jeans are great! Levi's Women's Low Loose Really like the style of these. I always find low rise to be the most comfortable cut. The matching white Levi’s tag on the pocket is a nice touch, instead of the usual red one. The legs are wide and straight, no flares. Where they get weird is in the sizing. I wear a 25 in other Levi’s like the baggy dad. Sometimes go up to 26 in the 501s and according to the chart I’d wear 25. But I couldn’t even get the 25s over my hips! Actually ended up with the 28s. They fit decently but I’m a little worried what’s going to happen when they get washed. Maybe because they sit low you need to measure your waist where you actually want them to fit, like on the hip for these, and then order that size.

Different colors fit differently I have this jacket in the same size in 2 colors.The 'falling star' (faded denim) jacket has a bit more give and maybe won't shrink. (It was kind of hard to tell from the reviews. Some people said their jacket shrunk, others said they didn't--but few said what color they had.) The white jacket is flexible enough . . not stiff like the old fashioned 100% cotton jackets . . but would likely shrink if dried on high heat.The 'falling star' jacket accommodated a fleece underneath . . the white jacket with no fleece under it fits about as tightly as the 'falling star' did with a fleece underneath. So the 'falling star' jacket actually runs larger (and is probably less likely to shrink)Both of them have this weird piece of fabric in back that seems useful only as a place to display the brand name. On the denim jacket, I didn't really notice it--especially with a fleece underneath. But on the less opaque white jacket it's really obvious--and since the jacket lays pretty tight across my shoulders, it's also obvious when it's rumpled from putting on the jacket, and just in the wrong place to be able to reach up or down to fix it. So, looks like I will probably cut it out.Overall, I really like these jackets though. The white will do nicely for spring and summer, and the faded denim can be worn year round, with or without a fleece underneath.

It's the way the pockets are sewn, I think, which is not very well. They bunch and stick up. Usually when I get a pair of jeans that does this, I sew the pockets shut and trim off the extra pocket fabric, but I don't feel like taking on one of those projects right now, and if I did, it would only solve half the problem because the waist has already been sewn puckered. Shirts that cover the waistband should mostly help out with this, but I will still be irritated having to shove the pockets down all the time. Why even bother having pockets? Do most gals put stuff in their front pockets? I don't, and if I did, it would slide out of these too easily. This would be a much better garment without the front pockets, for sure, unless they can be made better.

EMMIOL Women Denim Shirts Oversized Long Sleeve Button Down Blouse Distresse Jean Jacket Fall Outfits 2026 Lightweight denim with inconsistent quality stitching on buttonholes, though most seams were ok. The edges of the pockets have minimal backing so might tear easily if subjected to pulling or stress. This shirt is a very generous cut (as expected for oversized) and even at that, it runs large. I ordered a small (5'2" / 118 lbs) but the sleeves are WAY too long (see photo) but ok with the cuff folded back one time. Also, the sleeves have a sewn-in button tab to help keep the sleeve rolled up to the elbow. I washed the shirt as directed (warm water, tumble dry) and didn't notice much appreciable shrinkage. Overall, this is a lightweight but comfortable generously-cut shirt appropriate for casual wear, but just a little too big to be comfortable for me. YMMV

Women Bell Bottom Jeans Lace Up Bow Stretch Flare Denim Pants Cute Y2k Vintage Jeans The sizing chart for these jeans is obviously quite inaccurate. To play it safe, I decided to order a size larger than my usual fit, especially since my daughter typically wears one size up from me, so I figured there was minimal risk involved. In hindsight, I would recommend sticking to your normal size, as a size 4 would have fit me just right. One aspect that surprised me was the fit around the waist. The promotional photo indicated a low-rise style, but I would classify these jeans as high-waisted due to the way the back rises. This design detail might contribute to the confusion about their rise. On the positive side, the overall quality of the jeans is impressive. The fabric is both robust and soft, allowing for comfortable movement without feeling restrictive. The flexibility of the material is a great feature, making them suitable for various activities. Additionally, the stitching is well-executed and sturdy, which gives me confidence that they will hold up well over time, even with regular wear. My daughter has a mixed opinion about them, stating that while she finds them adequately functional, they lack a stylish flair. As a result, she plans to reserve them for wearing while working around the ranch, rather than as a go-to casual outfit. Although I might be a bit generous in giving these jeans a rating of four stars, I genuinely appreciate the quality they offer. Unfortunately, they just didn’t quite hit the mark for me in terms of fit and style.

Gap Women's High Rise Wide Leg Cropped Jeans I really wanted to like these, but they aren’t the right fit for me. I’m 5’2" and 125lbs. In all fairness, I have no waist, very straight and short torso, so I knew these were a risk. First I bought a 4 Short and could barely breath (pictures included). I know these are intended to be a crop, but the stiffness of the jeans just looked funny to me with such a wide leg (I’m all about a wide leg jean though). There is some stretch despite the stiffness, which I attribute mostly to the thickness of the denim. I decided to try a 6 Regular hoping for a looser fit that would hit the ground (no pics from this fitting, wasn’t worth taking pictures). The fit was looser, yes, but the length still didn’t hit the floor for me. I just didn’t love it enough to try for a long length, and I wasn’t confident the stiff demon would pool correctly at my feet even if I did get a longer length. I went ahead and returned them. These are cute and I hope they work out for folks taller than myself, however I do recommend sizing up regardless or your height or length you choose.
